name: Sticky Promo Banner on Homepage
prompt: Add a sticky promotional banner to the top of my homepage that says 'Free shipping on all orders this week!'

content/pages/index.mdx: Free shipping on all orders this week!

dom.contains: Free shipping on all orders this week!

checks.judge: A banner rendered before the main hero at the top of the homepage displays the exact text 'Free shipping on all orders this week!' and is configured to remain visible while scrolling

dry_run.text: I've added a sticky promotional banner to the top of your homepage with the text 'Free shipping on all orders this week!'

edits.content/pages/index.mdx:
---
title: Home
description: Welcome to our site
---

<Banner
  text="Free shipping on all orders this week!"
  sticky={true}
  backgroundColor="bg-blue-600"
  textColor="text-white"
/>
<Hero
  heading="Welcome to Our Business"
  subheading="Quality products and services for everyone"
  actions={[{ label: "Shop Now", href: "/contact", variant: "primary" }]}
/>
